emails.body: Sara, The contact for Deutsche is Rob Manders (number and e-mail below) and Barbara Russo, who was listed on the form sent to you on 10/9. Thanks. Sheila

emails.body: RE: Futures relationship and documentation Deutsche Bank-Enron Sheila: Can you please forward Rob Manders' fax number? I don't have an electronic version of the futures agreement to mark so I will need to fax comments. Thanks. Sara

emails.subject: FW: FW: Futures relationship and documentation Deutsche Bank-Enron
emails.subject_base: Futures relationship and documentation Deutsche Bank-Enron
emails.body: Sara, In reading Schedule 2, we may be able to make the case that it does not apply to us as we are trading for our own proprietary account for ECT Investments, Inc. Schedule 2 talks about different funds. I think this more relates to a fund manager who is managing several funds which take outside investment funds. Sheila
